steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
Piles of muck can be found in Gloomingtarn. You should sift through the muck for the Jewel of Adnâkh.
Piles of muck can be found in Gloomingtarn. You should sift through one last pile of muck for the Jewel of Adnâkh.
The Jewel of Adnâkh can be found in Gloomingtarn. You should collect the Jewel of Adnâkh.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Adnâkh to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Grave…
Rísti Graver can be found at Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
